name: incept-claude-plugins
description: Internal Incept marketplace for Claude Code reviewer-knowledge-base skills (course/product approval brainlifts).

plugins.name: grade3-reading-brainlift
plugins.description: Reviewer knowledge base for evaluating the live Grade-3 course reading-explorers-v2 — invariant ground-truth data, 7 SPOVs, 7 Insights, the reviewer's 11 findings with live-verified response, and 9 DOK-4 cross-source syntheses.

plugins.name: map-proxy-brainlift
plugins.description: Reviewer knowledge base for evaluating the Incept MAP Proxy (G2-G5 adaptive reading CAT) — defining feature of mastery, 7 SPOVs, v4 full-bank validation evidence (786 items), case for approval, audit history, 7 cross-source syntheses, and honest tradeoff logic vs. NWEA MAP Growth ground truth. Bundles the full source validity package as on-demand references.

plugins.name: grade5-reading-brainlift
plugins.description: Self-contained brief + operator manual for the live Grade-5 reading course g5-reading-merged-pp-9802: the design argument (leak-by-format, per-item cross-family certification, conversion by rewrite), the live-verified build state, the review context, and the operations layer — auth, live reads, the anti-leak gate, regen with rollback, feedback authoring, probes. Fully portable: bundled references/ carry the per-item ledger, evidence summary, decision memo, BrainLift, dated pull record, and cover email; bundled scripts/ include a stdlib-only TimeBack API client — no repository access required, only API credentials.
